case_title: OVERTON, KATHY et al vs. ONGPIN, OSCAR et al

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OVERTON, KATHY MILLS, SHEILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ONGPIN, OSCAR ONGPIN, OLIVIA OLGA $14,257.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,257.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR DEFENDANTS TO PAY $5714 TO PLAINTIFF OVERTON AND $8543 TO PLAINTIFF MILLS. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLS, SHEILA AS TO DEFENDANT ONGPIN, OSCAR ONGPIN, OLIVIA OLGA
